_comment: Explicit overrides for cells where scraper output is unreliable (JS-rendered pages) or where a recent change isn't yet reflected on the provider's public page. Applied on EVERY migration run as a forced UPDATE. To correct any cell: add an entry here, push. Next scrape cycle picks it up.

NP.note: Uber launched in Nepal May 2026; cities page is JS-rendered so scraper can't extract NP automatically
